action.description: The specific GitLab action to perform from the available tools.

project_id.description: The ID or path of the GitLab project (e.g., '12345' or 'group/project'). Required for most actions.

issue_id.description: The unique ID (iid) of a specific issue within a project.

mr_id.description: The unique ID (iid) of a specific merge request within a project.

title.description: The title for a new issue or merge request.

description.description: The description body for a new issue or merge request.

source_branch.description: The source branch for a new merge request.

target_branch.description: The target branch for a new merge request.

object_type.description: The type of object to comment on (either 'issue' or 'mr').

object_id.description: The ID (iid) of the issue or MR to get/create comments for.

comment_body.description: The text content of the comment to create.
